item.title: Version 2026.06.25
item.description:
What's New in 2026.06.25

  • Time Saved window redesign — a cleaner, Health-style layout. One big hero total for the period you're viewing now leads the window, with a momentum trend pill showing how you're tracking. The bar chart highlights the current period, marks your average with a dashed baseline, and is scrubbable — drag across it to read any day. This fixes the previous layout's quirks (Today shown three times, an inverted size hierarchy, and x-axis labels that were invisible in light mode), and bars now announce above/below average for VoiceOver. The Time / $ toggle moved up to the period control row.

All transcription happens 100% locally on your device.
